test_command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command '. .\scripts\docker-test-env.ps1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm run test:api; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm run test:contract; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git diff --check -- task.json contracts/openapi.yaml src/task-api tests/api tests/contract docs/testing/verify-matrix.md progress.txt

notes: Only enable subagents when the task has two or more independent subtasks, or when the controller/session must delegate a file write instead of writing directly.
Subagents must read the matching AGENTS/rules/docs/skills before concluding.
Read-only roles stay read-only and return summaries or concrete results, not full transcripts.
Any repo write outside driver-owned runtime outputs must go to a matching writer role; the controller/main session should not write directly.

commands.cmd: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command '. .\scripts\docker-test-env.ps1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm run test:api; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm run test:contract; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git diff --check -- task.json contracts/openapi.yaml src/task-api tests/api tests/contract docs/testing/verify-matrix.md progress.txt
